Partners & support

SciPy India is an official community partner of the Python Software Foundation.

We are incubated and supported by the FOSS United Foundation, a Section 8 non-profit organisation that aims to promote and strengthen the Free and Open Source Software (FOSS) ecosystem in India.

The FOSSEE project at the Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay offers hosting for our website domain. The Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay previously hosted several editions of the conference from 2009 to 2021.
